'''hayapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poaka|poaka]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poaka|poaka]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hayapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæyæpæth|hæyæpæth]] || [[word:hæyæpæj|hæyæpæj]] || [[word:hæyæpæsh|hæyæpæsh]] || [[word:hæyæpæ|hæyæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hayayapath|hayayapath]] || [[word:hayayapaj|hayayapaj]] || [[word:hayayapash|hayayapash]] || [[word:hayayapa|hayayapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hayapath|hayapath]] || [[word:hayapaj|hayapaj]] || [[word:hayapash|hayapash]] || [[word:hayapa|hayapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hayafpath|hayafpath]] || [[word:hayafpaj|hayafpaj]] || [[word:hayafpash|hayafpash]] || [[word:hayafpaf|hayafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hayapatha|hayapatha]] || [[word:hayapaja|hayapaja]] || [[word:hayapasha|hayapasha]] || [[word:hayapaka|hayapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hayapath|hayapath]] || [[word:hayapaj|hayapaj]] || [[word:hayapash|hayapash]] || [[word:hayapa|hayapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hayapathal|hayapathal]] || [[word:hayapajal|hayapajal]] || [[word:hayapashal|hayapashal]] || [[word:hayapakal|hayapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hayapathatha|hayapathatha]] || [[word:hayapajaja|hayapajaja]] || [[word:hayapashasha|hayapashasha]] || [[word:hayapaka|hayapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hayapathan|hayapathan]] || [[word:hayapajan|hayapajan]] || [[word:hayapashan|hayapashan]] || [[word:hayapakan|hayapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hayapathaoro|hayapathaoro]] || [[word:hayapajaoro|hayapajaoro]] || [[word:hayapashaoro|hayapashaoro]] || [[word:hayapakaoro|hayapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
